description: Key automation scripts active in the MAS9 Power demo tenant Maximo environment

automation_scripts.name: WOSTART_ENERGY_ISOLATION
automation_scripts.description: Validates that an energy isolation certificate has been raised before a WO can move to INPRG status

automation_scripts.name: ASSET_GIS_SYNC
automation_scripts.description: Pushes asset status changes to the fictional GIS layer via REST call

automation_scripts.name: PM_CRITICAL_DUEDATE
automation_scripts.description: Overrides calculated PM due date for assets marked CRITICALITY=HIGH by reducing the next-due period by 20%

automation_scripts.name: INVISSUE_PPE_ALERT
automation_scripts.description: Triggers notification to safety officer when HV-rated PPE stock falls below threshold

automation_scripts.name: WO_CREW_AUTO_POPULATE
automation_scripts.description: Queries site roster data and pre-populates crew on new WOs based on site and trade

automation_scripts.name: METER_ANOMALY_DETECT
automation_scripts.description: Applies statistical thresholds to meter readings and flags anomalies for review

automation_scripts.name: SCADA_WO_GENERATE
automation_scripts.description: Polls SCADA alarm feed and auto-generates Maximo work requests when alarm threshold exceeded

automation_scripts.name: REGULATORY_NOTIFY_CLOSE
automation_scripts.description: Sends regulatory notification email on WO completion for REGULATORY_NOTIFICATION_SENT=false WOs

automation_scripts.name: ASSET_CRITICALITY_CLASSIFY
automation_scripts.description: Auto-sets asset criticality rating based on VOLTAGE_CLASS custom field value

automation_scripts.name: WOACTIVITY_ISOLATION_VALIDATE
automation_scripts.description: Validates that ENERGY_ISOLATION_METHOD is populated before activity can be approved
